story_text: As an HR staff member, I want the system to flag any CV for which structured information could not be extracted with sufficient confidence — holding it back from the scoring pipeline and surfacing it in a dedicated review queue — and to display a visible notice to the recruiting team indicating that the current candidate pool may be incomplete pending my review of those flagged CVs, so that no CV is silently dropped, I can inspect and correct low-confidence extractions manually, and the recruiting team is always aware when the pool they are viewing is not yet complete.
acceptance_criteria: ["AC1: A CV must be flagged and withheld from the scoring pipeline when the confidence score for structured information extraction falls below 90%.", "AC2: Flagged CVs must appear in a dedicated review queue accessible to HR staff."]
